reviews.title: All In One
reviews.text: This Dual Coffee Espresso machine has so many options I feel like I am I could call myself a Barista!  I can make just a regular pot of coffee, it can be classic or strong coffee, over ice, flavored,espresso, latte, all different size of cups, 1/2 a pot, I even used it for just hot water for my tea.  At first I was intimidated by it but after reading, looking up videos and trying different things, it is pretty easy to use.  The Frother is easy to use, just make sure you remove it and rinse right away or it drips on your counter.  There is a warmer (red) light so that you know that the base is still hot and beeps when it is done brewing or dispensing.  You can delay the brew, pause it.  The stand has a pull out tray for when you want to brew just a cup and the expresso side has many different levels for different size cups.

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: Ninja US Ninja Espresso & Coffee Barista System makes the most delicious coffee and espresso and it’s strong, high quality coffee. I can tell the difference. This is an amazing machine. You turn it on and can choose which side to use. One side is for espresso and it works with capsules. Once you use a capsule you can open it back up and hear the capsule drop down in to a compartment that stores them until it’s full and then you can just dispose of them properly. The other side is for the coffee pot or you can bring down a little stand that you can put a coffee cup or mug on and just brew enough for one person. Of course you can brew a full pot of coffee too, or a half pot, or a travel size. It has so many options. It also has a coffee scoop that has small or large scoops and clearly shows you on the scoop how many scoops and which size scoop to use for whatever size coffee you choose to make. There is also a built in milk frother that you can use but you will first need to warm your milk in the microwave or stovetop prior to use because it will only froth the milk for you and will not heat it. The whole thing is easy to use and easy to clean. It’s such a great coffee system.

reviews.title: Excellent coffee multi-function machine
reviews.text:
I received the Ninja Expresso and Coffee Barista System a few days ago and it is awesome. We use it every single day several times per day!!!
I always struggle when trying to buy a coffee machine because in my house people like different kind of coffees. This machine solved my dilemma, it can do filter coffee, use Nespresso pods and make foam. So it makes everybody happy. Furthermore it saves a lot of space in your kitchen.
I also like the look of the machine, it is sober but classy.
The coffee selections and menus are intuitive and well done. It is easy to select the different options.
If you are looking for a machine that will meet everybody's expectation and look beautiful, I definitely recommend this machine

reviews.title: Perfect size for any space
reviews.text: This Barista and coffee system is the perfect size, even for small spaces. The simplicity of making an espresso or coffee amazed me! You can choose to make a cup (different sizes) or a pot of coffee. The milk frother folds in for easy storage and it works great for making a cappuccino. To make an espresso you simply add an espresso capsule and presto, you have yourself a perfect espresso! There’s a built in bin to put used capsules for recycling. There’s a delay brew option if you just can’t wait for your coffee. The instructions are very easy to follow and understand. The design of this barista system is slim and goes well with any decor. There’s nothing negative that I could say about this machine, I love it!

reviews.title: Engineering flaw on nespresso side
reviews.text: Love the brewed coffee side of the machine but the espresso side was definitely engineered upside down where the pod is placed. It doesn’t line up and lip is on the top side of where the pod sits instead of on the bottom. So you have to manually try from the top and bottom to get  the pods in the exact spot. I have called for support there response was try different pods which I did same problem. It is just an engineering flaw. So if you getting this machine to enjoy the espresso side don’t do it you will get very disappointed. If the actually heads of this company tried to use the espresso side on one taken out of the box they would see what I am talking about. Not one they have in the lab because I believe the inside was built upside down.

reviews.title: Missing Espresso Waffle Plate
reviews.text:
Hi All! 
Was a Keurig lover & wanted to evolve to espresso. Purchased the Ninja  espresso and coffee barista system. Cool a  Dual Brew Machine! Started great hit 6 months old and espresso waffle grid plate fell out. First clue pods didn't puncture through on the tops only the needle base. Was  able to locate the waffle  plate among used pods in the used pod  reservoir. Not so lucky the second time and 300$ machine and several wasted pods later machine is no longer  functional @  not even 9 months old. Cannot find replacement  parts for. Still under warranty but what a joke that is!  Very disappointed  considering lack of durability. Craftsmanship should be way better for the cost of this machine. Not to mention the cost  of wasted pods, as  espresso side  failed to  brew (just this water /grind mess)  through missing the waffle plate side in creating the correct aeration since it fell out.  And yes i descaled and cleaned machine. Since happened before and i can see where the waffle plate is missing.  Poor  craftsmanship issue! 
Have images that show where plate should be and how pods look after,  however the site won't allow images to be added   :-(

reviews.title: Nice machine but leaks after a few months
reviews.text: At first we loved this machine. Makes great coffee and is super versatile. Sometimes it can be hard to find the older style of nespresso pods, but Amazon to the rescue. The major con I have with it is after about 3-4 months it will leak around the brew basket. Ninja was great with out first one and sent a replacement to resolve the issue, but with this new one it is doing the exact same thing. At least it isn’t leaking on the counter but is still frustrating.

reviews.title: Poorly designed basket lid, too tall
reviews.text:
We own multiple Ninja products. This is our third coffee maker. What a disappointment. The new design is terrible. The unit is so tall that you have to pull it out to the edge of your counter to open the access lid to the filter basket high enough or to use the Nespresso single serve. We have standard height cabinets above our counter and yet this unit cannot be accessed while pushed back against the wall. The basket lid won’t raise high enough to remove the filter basket.  

The water reservoir is in the back. This requires plenty of space to the right-hand side of the unit to access it for removing and reinstalling. 

The filter basket lid is just a poorly designed plastic friction retention system. This is already wearing out and having trouble staying in the down or locked position after just a few months of use.

Notice the promo and marketing photos all show the unit on a wide-open countertop island or with some random shelves mounted high enough to not block the opening of the filter basket. 

The “rich brew” is simply the unit reducing the amount of water that is dispensed into the carafe. If you want a full pot of coffee, then you cannot chose “rich brew”. Rich Brew = 47 ounces, Classic Brew = 55 ounces. 

When using the Nespresso single serve the unit vibrates so much when brewing that your cup literally will shake off of the adjustable cup stand and spill your drink.  

Stick with the 10-Cup specialty coffee maker model and save yourself the waste of money that this unit is.

reviews.title: Excellent Pet Hair Vacuum with Plenty of Power
reviews.text:
The Shark Stratos Upright Vacuum - AZ3002 is what we call the blue whale. This vacuum is an exceptional performer that honestly surprised me with how well it cleans our home. Our home has older carpets with two cats and one dog, and it can get quite messy and furry quickly. Out of the box, the vacuum only took ten minutes to assemble and prepare. Once we began vacuuming, the amount of debris, dust, and animal hair was surprising. It did not take long to have our carpets looking better than they have been in some time. The cord is long enough to take care of multiple rooms before we had to unplug it to change it into another socket. The only downside to this vacuum is it is quite hefty, and extended periods of vacuuming can tire your arms; that, however, is not an issue because of the amount of power the vacuum has; it does not take long to have a clean home. The included s attachments work quite well, especially for lingering pet hair. The vacuum also has a light that makes vacuuming in dark areas easier to see. The dirt and dust canister is very simple to empty out by just pressing down on the back handle that is attached to it. The filter is washable and easy to clean. The rollers are made to help keep hair from windinf up, and are also easy to clean. There is a replaceable scented Odor Neutralizer pad that locks into the base to freshen your room, is very helpful to knock down animals
smells. We have used this vacuum several weeks now and not had to replace the filter. Overall, this is a fantastic and impressive vacuum.

reviews.title: An absolute work horse!
reviews.text:
I’m a Shark fan…I have assorted vacuums, appliances, and cookware, and I’ve been pleased with them all, so I certainly was happy to pick up the Stratos Power Lift Away Vacuum.  I’m not surprised that I love it, and let me tell you why.

First off, the vacuum came in perfect condition, well packaged, stowed in such a way that it can be constructed as you lift components out of the box.  In fact, one of the boxes flaps comes printed with instructions on how to get this put together.

Assembling was intuitive, and only took a minute or two and we were ready to go.  The cord is long, and the arm of the vacuum has a place to clip in the top so it isn’t as cumbersome to keep track of, and help the cord stay out of your path. 

There is an easy to use on and off button, and it stays on by itself (I’ve used other vacuums that required you hold onto a lever).  There is a setting for 3 floor types, and I’ve found them to be accurate.  

It moves smoothly, even though it is on the heavy side.  There is a light, which I love, that help illuminate my path, which is especially nice in dark corners.  The self cleaning brush roll really does work, keeping the head hair free, and common problem in the past.

The dust cup is large, which means I have to empty it less, which means, thankfully, the job gets done more quickly and I have more time to relax!  The handle releases easily when needing attachments for small jobs, and the wand itself releases when you need more reach.  The design is intelligent and elegant.

My favorite feature is the odor neutralizer…it works well, and it certainly freshens as it cleans.  Many vacuums start to smell stale or of dirt, but this feature keep it smelling like crisp and clean.

This vacuum is heavy, which I appreciate as it seems like it’s made of quality components…and this, along with my previous experience with Shark products, means it will last a very long time.  It also has a large head, which is great for getting finished quicker, but means it’s difficult to get into tight spaces.  It is loud, but not beyond expectation…this is a beast that means to do hard work, and well.

This vacuum has earned a place in my utility closet for years to come.  Another excellent product from the folks at Shark, and I do recommend!

reviews.title: Crazy suction!
reviews.text:
I bought this 3 weeks ago and I was concerned I might being spending too much money for a vacuum that wasn't going to be worth it. Well, let me tell you; it was worth every penny spent. 
I have 7 Siberian Huskies and we have is lots of hair everywhere. This machine can handle all that hair. I also love all the custom attachments. The Huskies ride in my Jeep so it is full of hair. Husky hair has a  small hook on one end which makes the hair anchor and hold onto fabrics. One attachment I used got 96% of the hair outta' my Jeep. Unbelievable!
I am so very pleased. There also was a useful attachment for dusting furniture.  It's efficient and saves time. Thank you Shark for making a vacuum with outstanding suctionpower. I look forward to vacuuming now. Love your product!!

reviews.title: Defect in the design
reviews.text: I  had to replacement the brush head twice in less than 2 years. There is a defect iin the design and the wheels dig into the plastic with time causing it difficult to push forward

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: This Shark Stratos Upright Vacuum cleaner is great. This vacuum is most advanced cleaning technologies . Odor neutralizer technology is new for me my previous vacuum don’t have these technologies( I like it).The suction is incredible. all the attachments are very useful and works great except the hose is way too short it is too hard to get under my beds.easy to switch to a different attachment, easy to clean dust cup and filter ! soft roller is removable so easily can clean.the cord length is good.not too loud ! quite heavy but quality is very good.

reviews.title: 1st use:Hair wrapped around power fins/suction low
reviews.text:
Bought this to replace my shark rotator, Thought getting the pet one would be great since I have two long hair mainecoon cats. 

Not only did it not pick up the cat hair it just pushed it around the carpet. 

I have shoulder length hair and it got wrapped up around the power fins on the 1st use.

The suction seems comparable to my shark Rotator.  The pet tools that they provide including the hand brush With powerfens doesn't really work well on carpeted stairs. 

Lastly, This vacuum doesn't have the Self propel feature like other shark vacuums have so it's kind of heavy and bulky to push around..

reviews.title: Works great at first
reviews.text: I bought this vacuum 9 months ago. We have a golden retriever, a Labrador retriever and my wife has long hair.  It worked great for about 4 months  when the performance began to decline quite a bit.  I disassembled the powerhead  and cleaned out the trapped dirt and hair. The performance improved for a few months and is now suffering again. The powerhead is again full of trapped dirt and hair and the Hair Pro brushroll is worn out. This machine and powerhead are far from self-cleaning, require too much maintenance to keep the performance up, and the Hair Pro brushroll wears out way too quickly. The only replacement is a new powerhead assembly-not cheap-that will last only 8 to 9 months under normal use.

reviews.title: I LOVE IT
reviews.text:
I bought this Stratos vac because I saw an infomercial late one night and on impulse, I bought it.  I am ashamed and happy to show the photo of the ground-in dander and pet hair extracted from my 8 foot circular area rug (don't judge me) that I thought was "clean".

It's pricey, but well worth the cost!  Now I have to vacuum the entire house.  I've already embarrassed myself enough, so won't post a picture of that outcome.

reviews.title: Life changing must have appliance
reviews.text: I bought my CREAMI about a week or so again. I have mad frozen yogurt and sorbets in many different flavors. It makes the most delicious healthy frozen treats. I struggled to find healthy store bought dessert options. Now, every night we have guilt free desserts! It is a use have for anyone looking for delicious, healthy dessert options! As someone who worked as a chef, the sky is the limit when it comes to options!

reviews.title: Versatile
reviews.text: Creamiest ice cream and sorbets at home! I love that I can customize my ice cream for my tastes, and leave out the stuff I don’t want in like food coloring. My favorite thing I’ve made so far, I froze coffee with lots of yummy creamer and put the machine on sorbet setting. It made the most delicious hot summer dessert! This machine comes with 3 pint cups with lids. To use it, make your ice cream, pour into the pint cup, place in the freezer until completely frozen, then put in the machine and pick your setting. The creami automatically kicks off. It creams your desserts in just a couple minutes! I used the chalkboard stickers to put on my containers so I can label my ice cream!

reviews.title: Healthy Ice Cream?!
reviews.text: The Ninja Creami has allowed me to eat ice cream every night without thinking about it twice! We can make our own low calorie desserts at a fraction of the price of normal healthy conscious ice creams. Non-dairy milk substitutes combined with protein powders and low sugar add ins…the combinations are literally endless. It’s great to know exactly what you are putting into your body, and the Ninja Creami allows you to do exactly that! The only two downsides are is that the machine is VERY loud when running, and that some of the parts are difficult to clean. I am very happy with my purchase and would definitely recommend to anyone on the fence, buy this ice cream maker!

reviews.title: Creamy Ice Cream
reviews.text:
I wasn't sure how I was going to feel about this Ninja Creami Ice Cream maker.  I was worried that it was just going to be one more kitchen gadget on our counter.  However, I love it!  It's so easy to use and the homemade ice cream tastes so much better than store bought!
I typically take about 20 mins on the weekend to make 3 pints of base ice cream (the machine comes with 3 individual pints).  Then, they're ready in the freezer whenever we're craving cookies and cream ice cream or a strawberry milkshake, just to name our two favorites.
It's so easy to pull the base out of the freezer and add mix ins such as cookies, candies, etc.   It's such a fun thing to do with my kids and it feels like a special treat for the whole family.  I'm hopeful we'll continue to plan ahead with the base ice creams since they have to freeze for 24 hours (or you can buy store bought and just add mix ins).  Overall, I think this is a great product for those that plan ahead and love homemade frozen treats on a regular basis.

reviews.title: The best summer appliance!
reviews.text: This product is a summer game changer.   Owning a pool comes with an unspoken understanding that you will provide frozen treats.  No one expects this and everyone loves it.  The machine is so easy to use with every lock and safety feature available.  The paddle is completely removable for easy cleaning.   The machine is quite loud so the likelihood of sneaking an adult treat without the kids is slim but that loudness is attributed to powerful equipment that blends the frozen treats with ease.   My children love the smoothie bowels for breakfast.   I love that they can have what they deem a treat while I deem a healthy breakfast.   It’s important for me to know what ingredients my kids are eating so I love that we can have fresh strawberry and agave ice cream made with milk from our farm share.   We love making plain ice cream and then after it is frozen adding mix-ins.  The consensus from the children visiting is their favorite treat is milkshakes with mix-ins to make a flurry.  Personally sorbet is my favorite because of how quick and easy it is, at one can of fruit it doesn’t get much simpler than that.  We LOVE the CREAMi.  It’s a machine  that not only makes delicious treats but provides a memorable experience.

reviews.title: Shaved Plastic in Ice Cream
reviews.text: Very disappointed!! I have had this machine a little over a year !! It started to scrape the inside of the plastic container. Leaving shaved plastic in the ice cream ! I didn’t notice it and I’m afraid I ate some of the plastic . So I made  another container of ice cream the same thing small pieces of shaved plastic!! I am looking online finding out this model has the same problem issue!! I called Ninja all they told me they are sorry it was over a year ago , that they would give me a discount on a new Creami … But please tell me is this machine going to do this again! So Ninja only guarantees it for a year. So why would I buy another machine, afraid it will do it again. I guess a person has to purchase one every year. Which is crazy . Very worried that I ate some of the shaved plastic .

reviews.title: CREAMi for the WIN
reviews.text: I’m really impressed and enjoying making delicious ice cream, gelato and sorbets with my Ninja CREAMi. I love that it makes pint sized portions which I find to be more than enough. I’ve found that the recipes are easy to make and the end result have always been a tasty, smooth, creamy, bowl of deliciousness. The containers can be prepared in advance and kept in the freezer until ready to turn into your favorite Ninja CREAMi desert. The "Mix-In" feature allows you to get creative with your treats by adding cookies, candy, fruit and nuts. I was hesitant to purchase at first because I already have two ice cream makers, but I’m so happy I did. No more ice, rock salt and churning. I love my CREAMi so far and I haven’t even used the Milkshake or Smoothie Bowl features yet.

reviews.title: Can’t do any better than this
reviews.text: Ok if you ever owned a ice cream maker we all know how long it takes and what a pain it is to add ice and make sure you keep adding ice and salt. Not with this ninja it the best thing ever invented and I mean that with all my heart. It’s so easy you just make up your favorite ice cream freeze it in the containers then slide it in machine and in less then 2 minutes your eating ice cream.  Ive made my old fashioned ice cream vanilla and chocolate. I’ve made fruit whip and dole whip and all sorts of things. I will always have this machine if it wears out I will definitely buy a new one it’s a must have in all homes.

reviews.title: Great, almost as good as previous Multi-Cooker
reviews.text: First we love the Ninja Multi-Cookers (not the round pressure Insta pot like ones; the oblong slower cooker ones). We've owned two of them and have bought another five for our two kids, two nieces, and my wife's sister. Our first one was a pretty basic one (4 in 1). Then we upgraded to the stainless steel Ninja 7 in 1 Cooking System Auto-IQ version. We still have it and love it. We wanted a second one for our RV but they stopped offering them, we were bummed. We tried a few copy-cat units from other manufactures but we less then impressed and returned them. Either to hot, couldn't read the settings, couldn't control the temps, to complicated, missing a feature, etc. While shopping online for yet another (4th) copycat version, we stumbled across this new Ninja PossibleCooker Pro and I ordered it; were anxious to try their new one. We bought this when it was in pre-order. We've had it now for about a month. First, I love the easy to read controls, the larger size pot and the newer nonstick coating. The shape of the base unit is exactly the same as our auto-IQ version, so we can use the smaller pot insert with it. (We had to buy a new cover and insert for our older IQ model as I broke the glass top and we wore out the non-stick coating using it so much). My wife says that this unit would be perfect if two things were different: 1) get rid of the hole in the glass top, it is too big and releases to much moisture (she uses a wine stopper to plug the hole while doing certain cooking - a better idea would be a rotating valve to control the moisture loss - open for soups or stews when you are trying to thicken them, closed for pot roasts, taco meat and baking to retain moisture) . 2) Go back to a non-metal glass top handle. It gets to hot when cooking and you have to use a pot holder to check your food, stir, etc. She uses a silicon alligator grippie as a pot holder. The only other thing; what are the temperatures of the various cooking modes?! They should be listed in the manual or online somewhere. This units slow cook low and high are higher temperatures of their older smaller models. It will boil water on the slow cook low setting. Otherwise we love it and will keep it.

reviews.title: Excellent Replacement for Many Appliances
reviews.text: The Ninja Foodi PossibleCooker PRO is a more than capable replacement for several kitchen appliances we needed to replace. Our primary use several times a month will be the slow cooker functionality. The settings allow you to adjust the cooking time and temperature easily. The non-stick surface makes cooking and cleaning easy. The included Ninja spoon worked well and did not scuff or scrape the bottom. It is super handy to have a handle on the lid to hold the spoon during cooking and storage. While our food was cooking, we heard a few cracking noises due to the temperature adjusting. This device has many other settings, including a bread maker. Included was also a recipe booklet to try for each setting. The controls for the settings are intuitive and straightforward to operate, so one can easily program and go about your day. Overall, the quality matches the high standard that our other Ninja kitchen appliances have.

reviews.title: GREAT ADDITION TO MY KITCHEN!!!
reviews.text: Ordered this six days before Super Bowl so I could slow cook and do pulled pork. This thing is AWESOME! It has SO MUCH more features than my other  slow cooker. Game day was great and I love this addition to my other Ninja appliances. I have their pressure cooker, flip toaster, multi blender, Flip oven, counter top grill and stainless sharpening knives to name a few. Plus I have gifted a lot to friends!  Plus I have Shark products also!!! Great products!

reviews.title: A must have for all kitchens
reviews.text: I received the Ninja Foodi Possible Pro Cooker. Wow!! Whomever invested this product, Kudos! The Ninja Foodie is a MUST HAVE for all households in my opinion. I’ve been cooking for 30 years for my family and I wish I’d have had this way back when because it would’ve saved me so much time. The Ninja Foodie replaces 14, yes you read that right, 14 appliances. It replaces your slow cooker, Dutch oven, bread maker, and much more. I’m t has Triple Fusion heat which means it cooks much faster than your regular ovens. You can take your food straight from the Ninja foodie to your dinner table. It’s 8.5 Quarts and 100% lead free, which for me is another plus. I definitely recommend this product to anyone who cooks for their families and are looking to save time while still making a nutritious and delicious meal for their loved ones. I also recommend this product for those who are limited on space. Again, the Ninja Foodie Possible Cooker Pro replaces 14 other appliances. Definitely a win win.

reviews.title: Great Cooker, Worth Every Penny
reviews.text:
After using this product now a few times, I can with confidence report that it is easy to use, does a great job and it has greatly simplified our lives. Also our grocery bill reduced by 33% because we do fewer convenience foods. 

It is a breeze to clean. 
Not shown are the fabulous roast and home style beef and noodles we made in it

reviews.title: Love it....
reviews.text: This cooker is great, I fixed a pot roast in 4 1/2 hours start to finish. The meat was so tender and this cooker doesn't seen to throw off as much heat into the room which is great in the summer. Can't wait to try all different recipes in this cooker it is so versatil. As you can see it has many different functions. I highly reccomend this cooker way better than a crockpot in my opinion.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: This Ninja Foodi PossibleCooker Pro has become my bestfriend. With this I can prepare me meals for breakfast, lunch and dinner. I cant believe how many different meals and delicious dessert I can make now. I love that I can remove the pot out and put it on the table and it even comes with a spoon that can be placed on the lid. I made a pot roast the other night and it came out so good. This has many different settings on it and keeps the food nice and hot and doesn't over cook it. So far it is working out amazingly for me and I can't recommend it enough to my family and friends.

reviews.title: Love this appliance!
reviews.text: Love this cooker for how fast it cooks!  I do soups, casseroles, bacon, eggs, stir fry, and use it for prepping large quantities of liquids for canning.  I also love the Sous Vide mode for cooking perfect tender meat and poultry.
